channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Lithium value addition secures 5 000 jobs
item.description: via The Herald ZW #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald ZW

item.title: Zim rolls out red carpet for beauty queen Zozi
item.description: via The Herald ZW #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald ZW

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: South Africa Joins Botswana, Zimbabwe, Zambia, Tanzania, Uganda, Egypt and More in Highlighting Extreme Travel Restrictions on the Epic 22,387-Kilometre Route to Russia
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimpapers Journalists Defy Management, Grab Chivayo Bribes
item.description: By A Correspondent — More than 30 journalists and workers at Zimpapers-owned radio station Capitalk FM have reportedly defied management... Continue reading "Zimpapers Journalists Defy Management, Grab Chivayo Bribes" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: 2000 Pedestrians Die In Hit And Run Accidents
item.description: By A Correspondent– Over 2,000 pedestrians were killed or injured in hit-and-run accidents across Zimbabwe in the first three months... Continue reading "2000 Pedestrians Die In Hit And Run Accidents" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Village heads back Constitutional Amendment Bill @bulawayo24
item.description: The Zimbabwe Village Heads Association (ZIVHA) has formally declared its support for the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Bill, 2026, describing the proposed changes as critical for institut... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Lula lula-loving Bulawayo man killed neighbour’s toilet while fighting over a talented prostitute
item.description: Deadly Desires: The Fatal Cost of Commercial Love in Zimbabwe In the dimly lit corners of Zimbabwe’s bustling townships, where the clinking of beer bottles masks the whispers of illicit transactions, a dark and deadly trend is emerging. The pursuit of commercial love, often seen via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe poultry industry tops US$1.2bn @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s poultry industry has surpassed a gross value of US$1,2 billion, underlining the sector’s growing contribution to food security, employment creation and economic activity, the Zimbabwe Poult... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Over 2,000 Pedestrians Killed Or Injured In Hit-and-Run Incidents
item.description: Hit-and-run incidents leave over 2,000 pedestrians dead or injured, sparking calls for tougher traffic laws and safer streets for everyone. The post Over 2,000 Pedestrians Killed Or Injured In Hit-and-Run Incidents appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwean boxer collapses, dies after winning SA fight @3menonaboat
item.description:
The Zimbabwe National Boxing and Wrestling Control Board confirmed his death after injuries from a fight in South Africa.

The post Zimbabwean boxer collapses, dies after winning SA fight first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: What happened to a once proud nation such that we now celebrate a borehole? @zimsituation @TendaiMbofana
item.description: Source: What happened to a once proud nation such that we now celebrate a borehole? Watching Zimbabweans sink so low is one of the most devastating experiences of my life. Tendai Ruben Mbofana A caricature currently circulating on social media depicts jubilant residents singing a via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Chivayo’s attempts to muzzle the media can never be justified: A response to Loughty Dube @zimsituation @TendaiMbofana
item.description: Source: Chivayo’s attempts to muzzle the media can never be justified: A response to Loughty Dube My heart bleeds when a profession held so dearly as the light of the world is cast into darkness. Tendai Ruben Mbofana The Phathisani Sibanda vehicle controversy, involving a lavish via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ‘Zimbabwe is well positioned to source adequate fuel amid Middle East tensions’, National Oil Company of Zimbabwe CEO tells Parly @thezimbabwean
item.description: NATIONAL Oil Company of Zimbabwe (NOIC) says it does not expect the Middle East crisis to disrupt the movement of fuel to the nation as it is well prepared to source the product from other suppliers. via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: RE: CHURCHES’ SUBMISSION IN SUPPORT OF THE CONSTITUTION OF ZIMBABWE (AMENDMENT NO. 3) H.B.1, BILL, 2026 @zimsituation
item.description: Source: RE: CHURCHES’ SUBMISSION IN SUPPORT OF THE CONSTITUTION OF ZIMBABWE (AMENDMENT NO. 3) H.B.1, BILL, 2026 – herald We the undersigned hereby make this submission on behalf of the Zimbabwe Indigenous Interdenominational Council of Churches (ZIICC), the main Umbrella Body rep via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe edges closer to joining BRICS bank @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Zimbabwe edges closer to joining BRICS bank – herald Africa Moyo and Oliver Kazunga ZIMBABWE is edging closer to potentially unlocking critical development finance after formal negotiations to join the BRICS’ New Development Bank began, offering a possible lifeline as the via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Children with congenital conditions get second chance at life @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Children with congenital conditions get second chance at life – herald Rumbidzayi Zinyuke in BULAWAYO IN many corners of the world, a child born with congenital conditions such as a cleft lip, a clubfoot or missing limb is relegated to the margins — unable to walk, speak via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zim’s poultry output gross value surges past US$1,2bn
item.description: Edgar Vhera THE gross value of Zimbabwe’s poultry products has surpassed the US$1,2 billion mark with significant downstream and upstream income and employment impacts across the economy, the Zimbabwe Poultry... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Minute Maid to Launch Affordable 1-Litre Pack in Zimbabwe as Schweppes Expands Juice Brand
item.description: Schweppes Holdings Africa says it is expanding its Minute Maid product range in Zimbabwe with the introduction of a new one-litre pack aimed at consumers looking for a more family-oriented take-home option. The announcement was made by Schweppes Holdings Africa Managing Director via Zimbuzz #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz
